retrieved_result: DEFINITION of 'Non-Accountable Plan' DEFINITION of 'Non-Accountable Plan'A system under which a business provides payments to its employees to cover business expenses incurred for meals, travel, transportation, or entertainment, but under which the employee does not have to substantiate the expenses or return advance payments in excess
